# v0.0.2 — Degenerate Empty Fixture (rubric calibration)

**Released:** 2026-01-01
**Type:** feature

## Summary

This fixture tests the rubric's floor behavior. It has a header block and a minimal Summary section,
but no cleanup-mission markers, no Forward Lessons section, no Threads section, no Retrospective, and
no Components/Gates section. The cleanup rubric should score this at D or F (less than 60 points).

This is intentionally sparse to verify that the rubric does not award phantom points for absence of
content. A real cleanup milestone with proper documentation should score well above this fixture.
